data.title: Services
data.subtitle: Data engineering and analytics delivery: reliable pipelines, clear models, and insights your teams can trust.

items.title: ETL & data pipelines
items.description: Design and run batch and incremental pipelines with Python, orchestration tools, and SQL.

items.title: Data modeling & warehousing
items.description: Build dimensional and relational models with consistent business logic.

items.title: BI & reporting
items.description: Deliver Power BI dashboards and semantic models with governance and RLS.

items.title: APIs & data platforms
items.description: Develop data APIs and backend services with FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and Docker.

items.title: Integration & ERP connectivity
items.description: Unify ERP and operational sources into a single analytics-ready data layer.

items.title: Analytics engineering & quality
items.description: Implement tests, lineage, and monitoring for trusted and maintainable datasets.

items.title: Machine learning
items.description: Support model training, evaluation, and operationalization on top of clean data.

items.title: Agentic AI
items.description: Build practical agent workflows with guardrails and clear business outcomes.

items.title: LLMs & GenAI
items.description: Integrate LLM features such as retrieval, summarization, and assistant experiences.
